{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/261977334?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kodareef5/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kodareef5/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kodareef5/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kodareef5/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/kodareef5", "id": 261977334, "login": "kodareef5", "node_id": "U_kgDOD5109g", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kodareef5/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kodareef5/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kodareef5/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kodareef5/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kodareef5/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/kodareef5", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-40574", "cvss": {"score": 6.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "### Impact

An authorization bypass exists in OAuth2 Proxy as part of the `email_domain` enforcement option. An attacker may be able to authenticate with an email claim such as `attacker@evil.com@company.com` and satisfy an allowed domain check for `company.com`, even though the claim is not a valid email address.

The issue **ONLY** affects deployments that rely on `email_domain` restrictions and accept email claim values from identity providers or claim mappings that do not strictly enforce normal email syntax. The practical risk ONLY exists in self-hosted or custom OIDC environments and federated setups where unexpected claim values can reach oauth2-proxy. Standard hosted providers that enforce valid email formatting ARE NOT effected.

### Patches
Users should upgrade to `v7.15.2` or later once available.

### Workarounds
The most effective workaround is to ensure the configured identity provider cannot emit malformed or attacker-controlled email claim values.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00209, "percentile": 0.10923}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-c5c4-8r6x-56w3", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-15T19:23:54Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c5c4-8r6x-56w3", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-c5c4-8r6x-56w3"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40574"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-21T17:16:55Z", "published_at": "2026-04-15T19:23:54Z", "references": ["https://github.com/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy/security/advisories/GHSA-c5c4-8r6x-56w3", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40574", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c5c4-8r6x-56w3"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy/security-advisories/GHSA-c5c4-8r6x-56w3", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy", "summary": "OAuth2 Proxy has an Authorization Bypass in Email Domain Validation via Malformed Multi-@ Email Claims", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-27T16:15:38Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-c5c4-8r6x-56w3", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "7.15.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy/v7"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 7.15.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: OAuth2 Proxy has an Authorization Bypass in Email Domain Validation via Malformed Multi-@ Email Claims
